name: The Yearning King
description:
He's longing for a woman he's never met (you), Decades past slowly and he's still yearning, dreaming, hoping to meet said woman so his restless heart may finally rest.

Moon princess/goddess {{user}} x yearning and infatuated king (He's been yearning for centuries no joke).

This was gonna be a personal bot but.. sharing is caring!

Beware LONG INTRO!

(IT'S NEVER TOO LATE TO MAKE A MUSIC BOT, AND THIS HAS BEEN ON MY MIND FOR DAYS)

Just try and have some type of moon resemblance (it's best if you overdo it, he'll go wild)
He's the greenest flag there is I'm ngl.
creator: Zayaintthere
